query:
SELECT DISTINCT o.id, o.orderNumber, o.erpCompanyId,
  COUNT(DISTINCT oi.id) as itemCount,
  SUM(CASE WHEN (p.imageUrl IS NOT NULL AND p.imageUrl != '') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as itemsWithImage,
  SUM(CASE WHEN oi.supplierId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as itemsWithSupplier
FROM orders o
JOIN order_items oi ON oi.orderId = o.id
JOIN products p ON p.id = oi.productId
GROUP BY o.id, o.orderNumber, o.erpCompanyId
HAVING itemsWithImage > 0 AND itemsWithSupplier > 0
ORDER BY o.id DESC
LIMIT 10;
